name: RapiDoc Slots
description: HTML slots for injecting custom content into the <rapi-doc> web component.

fields.name: logo
fields.description: Replace the default RapiDoc logo in the header. Use an or SVG element.

fields.name: header
fields.description: Inject custom HTML into the header bar beside the heading text.

fields.name: footer
fields.description: Inject custom HTML into the footer below the API documentation.

fields.name: nav-logo
fields.description: Replace the logo shown at the top of the navigation sidebar.

fields.name: overview
fields.description: Inject custom HTML at the top of the Overview section, before API info.
